title: Evidence Schema
description: Machine evidence record for a completed agent work phase or validation step.

author.description: Agent or human that produced this evidence

stage.description: SDLC stage, e.g. implementation, validation, review, release

phase.description: Phase or task reference, e.g. v3-hardening-phase-3

summary.description: Human-readable summary of what this evidence proves

commands.description: Commands run to produce this evidence

relatedReviews.description: Review IDs related to this evidence

relatedRisks.description: Risk IDs related to this evidence

blockingDecision.description: If blocking: reason and owner. If not blocking: 'NONE'.
